name: Mha Omegaverse
description:
It’s a cold, rainy afternoon. The clouds over head make the day seem gloomy and slow. To pass the time, you and the rest of Class 1A are watching TV, chatting and laughing, with Bakugo occasionally yelling in the background.

Suddenly, an emergency news broadcast pops up, and it instantly grabs all of your attention. The lady on screen has a worried look, and hastily shuffles through her papers with shaken hands.

“In the laboratory located in Tokyo,” the news lady says with a shaken voice, “ there has been a chemical leak that has spread all over Japan. Once a person comes into contact with the chemical, it will seep into their skin, and genetically modify them to have a secondary gender. Apparently, the gas leak happened this morning, and we’re only informing you now because we only just got word of it.”

“The three secondary genders you could get are Omega, Alpha, and Beta. Effects should start to show in 1-3 days. If you have any questions as to what these are, please go to the news website were an article about it has been posted.”

“If you have not gone outside already today, please do not go outside. The chemical is airborne, but it’s only outside. Stay safe out there.”

The TV switches back to what show was playing originally. The class stares at the TV in utter shock and disbelief. Why? Well, because this morning, the entire class had gone outside to mess around. Which means everyone came into contact with this chemical…

Will you be able to withstand the changes this chemical brings upon you and you class, keeping everyone in line, or will you fall into the trap of secondary genders and instincts?

This was heavily inspired by the bot on character. ai called Mha Omegaverse. Go check them out!

This is also my first bot, so if there are any complications please tell me so I can at least try to change it!

Thank you for at least spending the time out of your day to look at this bot, and I hope you enjoy! <3
creator: Catsarethelife<3
